violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed ice chute on soda dispenser needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed box of single use cups on floor in storage/pantry area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor in storage/pantry area needs to be cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
